title: Al Jazeera 'Bila Hudud' interview with Ahmad Mansour — Part 2
dateStatus: Needs review — broadcast date 3 June 2015 recorded in candidate file and referenced in S2015-005 verification notes; this item itself has not been reviewed in the current verification pass
speakerNameMethodologicalNote: Contemporary public name at the time of this record: Abu Muhammad al-Jolani. The name Ahmad al-Sharaa is used here as a cross-period project identifier for organisational purposes and does not imply self-identification under that name at the date of this record.
locationCertainty: Unknown — filming location not disclosed by broadcaster
evidenceSummary: The second part of the 'Bila Hudud' (بلا حدود) television interview on Al Jazeera Arabic, provisionally attributed to journalist Ahmad Mansour. Part 2 is recorded in the candidate file with a broadcast date of 3 June 2015, one week after Part 1 (S2015-005, broadcast 27 May 2015). The 3 June 2015 date is also referenced in the S2015-005 verification notes ('Part 2 aired 3 June 2015'). The channel, interviewer, broadcast date, primary video recording, and transcript for Part 2 have not been independently verified in the current research pass (which covered S2015-005 only). Part 2 is logged as a separate record because it carries a distinct broadcast date.
publicResearchNote: Part 2 of the Bila Hudud interview is retained as a separate Phase 1 corpus candidate because it carries a distinct broadcast date (3 June 2015) and may contain content requiring separate analysis. The primary video source, transcript, and all bibliographic details for Part 2 require verification. This item has not been reviewed in the current verification pass; see S2015-005 for the verified Part 1 record.
